# Third-party RTL

| File | Source | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| `cfar_ca.v` | [AERIS-10 / PLFM_RADAR](https://github.com/NawfalMotii79/PLFM_RADAR) | Cell-Averaging CFAR detector — used as **DUT** in my testbench |

Bundled so `hdl/radar_demo_tb.v` simulates without cloning the full hardware repo. Credit to the AERIS-10 open-hardware team.
